title: IncentiveAccountProductTypeValues
description:
A savings account that provides rewards when a customer reaches a predefined savings target.

Comment:
Example:

Save €10,000 in 24 months and receive a €100 bonus.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cashback Reward Account
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A bank account that provides cashback rewards on eligible transactions, such as debit card or credit card purchases.

Comment:
Example:

1% cashback on grocery purchases

0.5% cashback on utility payments made from the account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bonus Interest Savings Account
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A savings account that provides extra interest when certain conditions are met, such as maintaining a minimum balance or making regular deposits.

Comment:
Example:

Base interest: 1%

Bonus interest: +1% if monthly deposits exceed €500.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loyalty Reward Account
x-enumeration-literals.description:
An account that rewards customers for keeping funds in the account for a long time.

Comment:
Example:

Additional interest after funds remain in the account for 12 months.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Salary Incentive Account
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A current account that offers benefits when a customer's salary is deposited regularly.

Comment:
Example:

Fee waiver if salary is credited monthly

Monthly cashback or reward points.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction Reward Account
x-enumeration-literals.description:
An account that gives rewards based on the number or value of transactions performed.

Comment:
Example:

Points earned for every debit card payment

Rewards for using digital banking services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Referral Reward Account
x-enumeration-literals.description:
An account that rewards customers for referring new customers to the bank.

Comment:
Example:

€50 credited to the account for each successful referral.
